title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal is projected to deliver 40% more capabilities in 2026 through expanded AI adoption. High-adoption teams are now deploying daily and completed a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6x faster with AI tools.
